import React,{useEffect,useRef,useState}from"react";import"./HotRoomsView.scss";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const HotRoomsView=()=>{const[isOpen,setIsOpen]=useState(false);const[isClosing,setIsClosing]=useState(false);const[rooms,setRooms]=useState([]);// drag state

useEffect(()=>{const updateHandler=e=>{const detail=e.detail;if(!detail)return;// sort client-side (defensive) by userCount desc
